title: Plasma vs Serum
script_summary: A clear breakdown of the differences between plasma and serum, revealing hidden complexities.

segments.voiceover: What’s the difference between plasma and serum? It’s more fascinating than you think.
Both are derived from blood, but they serve different purposes.
Plasma is the liquid component, rich in proteins and nutrients, keeping your blood flowing.
Serum? It’s what’s left when you remove the clotting factors from plasma. Surprised?
So, while plasma supports circulation, serum is key for testing and treatments. Both vital, yet different.
Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow for more fascinating insights!
